qa_pairs.question: How many idle large memory nodes are available for whole-node jobs requesting a 3-hour walltime?
qa_pairs.answer: There are 3 idle large memory nodes available for whole-node jobs requesting a 3-hour walltime.

qa_pairs.question: For 3-hour walltime jobs, how many idle large memory nodes are available for by-core partitions?
qa_pairs.answer: For 3-hour walltime jobs, there is 1 idle large memory node available for by-core partitions.

qa_pairs.question: What is the number of idle large memory nodes for 12-hour walltime jobs, split between by-node and by-core partitions?
qa_pairs.answer: For 12-hour walltime jobs, there are 3 idle large memory nodes for by-node partitions and 1 for by-core partitions.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any idle large memory nodes available for jobs with a 24-hour walltime limit?
qa_pairs.answer: No, there are no idle large memory nodes available for jobs with a 24-hour walltime limit, for either by-node or by-core partitions.

qa_pairs.question: How many idle GPU nodes are listed across all walltime limits in this data?
qa_pairs.answer: There are no idle GPU nodes listed across any of the walltime limits (3 hr, 12 hr, 24 hr, 72 hr, 168 hr) for either by-node or by-core partitions.

qa_pairs.answer: There are 871 regular nodes allocated for whole-node jobs with a 3-hour maximum walltime.

qa_pairs.answer: There are 851 regular nodes designated for whole-node jobs requesting a 12-hour runtime.

qa_pairs.answer: There are 391 regular nodes assigned to by-core jobs with a 24-hour walltime limit.
